parameters.query: SELECT value::int as days FROM outreach_config WHERE key = 'cold_after_days'

WITH cold_candidates AS (
  UPDATE outreach_leads
  SET status = 'COLD',
      lost_reason = 'Auto-COLD: sin actividad > ' || {{ $json.days || 14 }} || ' dias',
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE status IN ('CONTACTED', 'IN_CONVERSATION')
    AND updated_at < now() - ({{ $json.days || 14 }} || ' days')::interval
    AND followup_count >= (SELECT COALESCE(value::int, 4) FROM outreach_config WHERE key = 'max_followup_attempts')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT count(*) as cold_count FROM cold_candidates;

WITH discarded AS (
  UPDATE outreach_leads
  SET status = 'DISCARDED',
      lost_reason = 'Auto-DISCARD: telefono invalido',
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE status = 'NEW'
    AND (phone IS NULL OR phone = '' OR length(phone) < 8
         OR phone !~ '^\+?[1-9][0-9]{7,14}$')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT count(*) as discard_count FROM discarded;

WITH dedup AS (
  SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY phone ORDER BY created_at ASC) as rn
  FROM outreach_leads
  WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != ''
    AND status NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'WON')
),
duplicates AS (
  UPDATE outreach_leads
  SET status = 'DISCARDED',
      lost_reason = 'Auto-DISCARD: duplicado por phone',
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM dedup WHERE rn > 1)
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT count(*) as dedup_count FROM duplicates;

SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'NEW') as total_new,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'CONTACTED') as total_contacted,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'IN_CONVERSATION') as total_in_conv,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'QUALIFIED') as total_qualified,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'ONBOARDING') as total_onboarding,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'WON') as total_won,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'COLD') as total_cold,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'LOST') as total_lost,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'DISCARDED') as total_discarded,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads) as grand_total;

INSERT INTO outreach_logs (lead_id, direction, channel, content, processing_status)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM outreach_leads ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1),
  'system',
  'internal',
  json_build_object(
    'type', 'hygiene_run',
    'cold_count', {{ $node['Auto-COLD Inactivos'].json.cold_count || 0 }},
    'discard_count', {{ $node['Descartar Phones Inválidos'].json.discard_count || 0 }},
    'dedup_count', {{ $node['De-duplicar por Phone'].json.dedup_count || 0 }},
    'timestamp', now()
  )::text,
  'processed'
RETURNING id;

meta.description: Cron diario 06:00 UTC. Auto-COLD leads inactivos (>14d + max follow-ups agotados), descarta phones inválidos y de-duplica. Registra resultados en outreach_logs.
